subjects.description: Black ant emerging from the entrance of a detailed anthill in a green garden.
subjects.appearance_details: Glossy black segmented exoskeleton, antennae probing forward, six thin legs, small mandibles, fine grains of sand clinging near the entrance.
subjects.relationship: Single ant subject leaving its anthill and entering the sunlit garden environment.
subjects.location: Macro foreground at the small entrance of a compacted soil and sand anthill.
subjects.relative_size: Tiny in real scale but large in the macro frame, with soil grains appearing like pebbles.
subjects.orientation: Facing outward from the anthill toward the camera and slightly to camera right.
subjects.pose: Head first at the tunnel opening, front legs testing the ground, antennae extended.
subjects.action: Cautiously climbs out of the anthill and steps into sunlight.
subjects.state_changes: Starts with only the head visible, pulls the body out through the entrance, ends fully outside with antennae scanning the garden air.
subjects.expression: No human expression, alert and cautious body language.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Hard glossy black exoskeleton with segmented texture and tiny reflective highlights.
subjects.facial_features: Small head, moving antennae, tiny mandibles, dark compound eyes.

background_setting: Lush green garden seen from macro ground level, with blurred grass blades, soft leaves, compacted soil, sand grains, and a small intricate anthill entrance.

lighting.conditions: Bright natural sunlight at ground level, warm highlights on soil grains and ant shell, soft green bokeh behind.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright natural sunlight at ground level, warm highlights on soil grains and ant shell, soft green bokeh behind.

aesthetics.composition: Macro naturalism, miniature scale, detailed soil texture, quiet curiosity, garden freshness.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Macro naturalism, miniature scale, detailed soil texture, quiet curiosity, garden freshness.

cinematography.camera_motion: Extreme close macro shot at anthill level, shallow depth of field, slow push in as the ant emerges.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: Realistic text to video macro nature scene with precise insect movement.
artistic_style: Documentary macro realism with crisp foreground detail and soft garden background.
context: A tiny ant leaves its carefully built anthill and cautiously enters the sunlit garden world.

actions.description: The ant head appears in the anthill entrance, antennae moving through the sunlight.
It pulls its segmented body out grain by grain, legs testing the soil around the opening.
The ant steps fully outside, pauses, and scans the garden with quick antenna movements.

segments.description: Macro view of an anthill entrance with the ant head just visible.
segments.key_changes: Macro view of an anthill entrance with the ant head just visible.
segments.camera: Extreme close macro shot at anthill level, shallow depth of field, slow push in as the ant emerges.

segments.description: Glossy black body emerges against detailed grains of soil and sand.
segments.key_changes: Glossy black body emerges against detailed grains of soil and sand.
segments.camera: Extreme close macro shot at anthill level, shallow depth of field, slow push in as the ant emerges.

segments.description: The ant stands outside with blurred green garden behind.
segments.key_changes: The ant stands outside with blurred green garden behind.
segments.camera: Extreme close macro shot at anthill level, shallow depth of field, slow push in as the ant emerges.

temporal_caption: 0:00-0:02 an ant appears at a tiny anthill entrance. 0:02-0:05 it climbs out into sunlight. 0:05-0:07 it pauses outside, antennae scanning the garden.
audio_description: Very subtle garden ambience, faint breeze in grass, distant insect hum, nearly silent tiny soil movement.
